descriptionParagraphs: The Midgician from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard developed for Modern Mid-Length Performance in small and medium-sized conditions.

The Midgician provides a stable and forgiving ride for beginner to advanced surfers. Well-suited for a wide range of wave conditions and is the preferred choice for surfers looking for a versatile mid-length that performs like a modern shortboard. The Midgician features a flat entry rocker that seamlessly flows into a flattened exit. The flat bottom curve is combined with a forgiving, catch-resistant boxy rail and a single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins, eventually blending into a flat exit through the tail that provides an instant burst of speed from take-off and delivers maximum speed generation whilst maintaining manoeuvrability and drive.

The Midgician has been developed to outperform any other mid-length on the market. Combines the Mid-Length experience with modern Performance. We recommend riding this board at least 4 inches longer than your regular shortboard.
Available off the rack in PU or E3-Lite technology.
